page: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv6 server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C x86_64 processor running at 4.2 GHz, configured with 8 vCPUs across 4 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system features 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It includes a 472 GB local SSD and supports Premium Storage, operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. No dedicated GPU is included in this configuration.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2171.0 placing in the top tier. Single-threaded gzip compression is also strong at 31.31 GB/sec. Most multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics fall into the average category, including a stress-ng multi-core score of 7990.62 and a large-block read memory bandwidth of 66.9 GB/sec. The processor's support for advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX accelerates vector and matrix operations, though text generation for medium 7B LLM models is a relative bottleneck, performing in the bottom tier at 8.03 tokens/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D8ds_v6 offers a balanced resource density for general-purpose workloads, combining dedicated compute power with a fast local SSD without the premium cost of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated instances. This configuration is well-suited for applications requiring a balance of CPU and memory, such as web serving, database operations, software compilation, and moderate data processing tasks that benefit from fast single-core execution and local scratch storage.
description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv6 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C x86_64 processor running at 4.2 GHz. It features 8 vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a 472 GB local SSD with Premium Storage support. Operating under Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance delivers top-tier single-core performance, as evidenced by a Geekbench single-core score of 2171.0, and strong single-threaded gzip compression. While multi-core benchmarks and memory bandwidth align with average mid-range performance, the inclusion of AVX-512 and Intel AMX instructions enhances vector and matrix calculations. Lacking a GPU, it is not designed for heavy LLM text generation, but its balanced resource allocation and qualitative cost efficiency make it highly suitable for general-purpose workloads, web serving, software compilation, and database operations requiring fast local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v6 is an 8-vCPU general-purpose VM featuring an Intel Xeon processor, 32 GB RAM, and a 472 GB local SSD, delivering top-tier single-core performance for balanced workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v6 is a general-purpose VM with 8 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a 472 GB local SSD, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon CPU.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring high-speed single-core Intel processing and integrated local SSD storage for versatile workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 8 vCPUs and 32 GB RAM
Includes a 472 GB local SSD with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-core performance with a Geekbench score of 2171.0
Supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX
Best suited for general-purpose workloads, web serving, and database operations
